text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One morning, I see a large pile of<n>cardboard boxes
in front of the school<n>dormitories.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Most likely they were supposed to be<n>delivered to
the academy, but wound<n>up here instead.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh! I've never seen so much<n>stuff before!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: My arms are itching to pick it all up!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Without a moment's hesitation,<n>Winning Ticket
tries to lift one of the<n>boxes.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Stop right there, Ticket. Are you<n>seriously going to
carry all of those?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! This'll be a cinch for us! Piece<n>of carrot
cake!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Uh... no way. I just did some quick<n>calculations
and there's no way<n>we'll be able to make it by
the first<n>bell.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so there's a time limit to this race,<n>huh? That
makes it even better!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket grabs a box and runs<n>off.
Moments later...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Done! Okay, next round! Staaart!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh? She's 5.8 seconds faster than I<n>predicted. Are
you going to break<n>your limit, Ticket?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You bet! I'm gonna be even faster<n>this time!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Curious. I shall see if I, too, can<n>surpass my limit.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Not only Biwa Hayahide, but a steady<n>stream of
other students begin taking<n>boxes as well.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! You'll never beat meeeee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A crowd runs back and forth between<n>the
dormitories and the academy.<n>Within minutes, the
number of boxes<n>dwindles.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Here comes the last ooone!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That was a great morning workout!<n>I'm not sure
who got first, though!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
One thing's for sure—it seems like we<n>all broke
through our limits.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to everyone's efforts, the<n>problem is
resolved quickly.
